requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (JS / IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant requirements under JSMO)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（JSMO框架下JS / IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂要求）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（JSMO框架下JS / IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑要求）

summary.en: Household refrigerators sold in Jordan overwhelmingly use R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3), the same low-GWP hydrocarbon refrigerant used in China and the EU. Jordan does not operate an EU-style horizontal F-Gas phase-down regulation; instead, refrigerant safety for household appliances is governed at the appliance level through the Jordanian Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24, which includes the flammable-refrigerant requirements (maximum R-600a charge per compartment configuration, ventilation provisions, ignition-source controls). Manufacturers must: (1) verify that the R-600a charge complies with the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant charge limits; (2) declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge quantity in grams in the product documentation and on the rating plate; and (3) ensure flammability safety markings are present. Jordan, like other parties to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment, participates in the international HFC phase-down, but this operates at the national/import-control level rather than as an EU-style product-by-product F-Gas prohibition schedule.
summary.zh: 在约旦销售的家用电冰箱绝大多数使用R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约3），与中国和欧盟所用相同的低GWP碳氢制冷剂。约旦不实行类似欧盟的横向氟气体削减法规；家用器具的制冷剂安全在器具层面通过采纳IEC 60335-2-24的约旦标准管理，其中含可燃制冷剂要求（每种隔间配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风规定、点火源控制）。制造商须：（1）核实R-600a充注量符合所采纳IEC 60335-2-24的可燃制冷剂充注量限值；（2）在产品文件及铭牌上声明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）确保具备可燃性安全标识。约旦作为《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方，参与国际HFC削减，但其在国家/进口管制层面运作，而非类似欧盟逐产品的氟气体禁令时间表。
summary.zht: 在約旦銷售的家用電冰箱絕大多數使用R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約3），與中國和歐盟所用相同的低GWP碳氫製冷劑。約旦不實行類似歐盟的橫向氟氣體削減法規；家用器具的製冷劑安全在器具層面通過採納IEC 60335-2-24的約旦標準管理，其中含可燃製冷劑要求（每種隔間配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風規定、點火源控制）。製造商須：（1）核實R-600a充注量符合所採納IEC 60335-2-24的可燃製冷劑充注量限值；（2）在產品文件及銘牌上聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）確保具備可燃性安全標識。約旦作為《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方，參與國際HFC削減，但其在國家/進口管制層面運作，而非類似歐盟逐產品的氟氣體禁令時間表。

standards_or_laws: JS / IEC 60335-2-24 — flammable-refrigerant requirements (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source controls) — adopted Jordanian Standard under JSMO
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment — international HFC phase-down at national/import-control level (no EU-style product-by-product F-Gas schedule in Jordan)

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant safety for household appliances through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates the R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24, supplemented by GB 9237 (safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149). China conducts its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE), separate from any EU-style product F-Gas schedule. Chinese household refrigerators are already predominantly R-600a, so the refrigerant technology aligns well with Jordanian expectations; the main task is documentation and charge verification against the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 limits used by JSMO.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 4706.13-2014处理家用器具的可燃制冷剂安全，其中纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定，并辅以GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理，与任何类似欧盟的产品氟气体时间表无关。中国家用电冰箱已主要采用R-600a，故制冷剂技术与约旦预期高度契合；主要任务是文件与充注量核实，须符合JSMO所采纳IEC 60335-2-24的限值。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 4706.13-2014處理家用器具的可燃製冷劑安全，其中納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定，並輔以GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理，與任何類似歐盟的產品氟氣體時間表無關。中國家用電冰箱已主要採用R-600a，故製冷劑技術與約旦預期高度契合；主要任務是文件與充注量核實，須符合JSMO所採納IEC 60335-2-24的限值。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: Because both China and Jordan handle R-600a at the appliance level via IEC 60335-2-24, this is primarily a documentation and verification gap rather than a technology gap: (1) Charge documentation — Jordanian product documentation and the rating plate must clearly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and flammability safety precautions consistent with the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant requirements. (2) Charge-limit verification — the R-600a charge must be confirmed against the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 maximum limits; Chinese CCC test data generally covers this since GB 4706.13 derives from the same IEC text, but the conformity dossier presented to JSMO should explicitly evidence the charge-limit compliance. (3) No horizontal F-Gas schedule — unlike the EU, Jordan does not impose an EU-style product-by-product F-Gas prohibition timeline, so there is no EU 2024/573-style Annex prohibition to map; HFC-based legacy models, if any, are managed through Jordan's national HFC import controls under the Kigali framework rather than a product ban schedule (confirm import-quota/control status with the importer).
gap.zh: 由于中约均在器具层面通过IEC 60335-2-24处理R-600a，此处主要为文件与核实差距而非技术差距：（1）充注量文件——约旦产品文件及铭牌须清晰标明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及与所采纳IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂要求一致的可燃性安全注意事项。（2）充注量限值核实——R-600a充注量须按所采纳IEC 60335-2-24最大限值确认；因GB 4706.13源自相同IEC文本，中国CCC检测数据通常已涵盖，但提交JSMO的符合性档案宜明确佐证充注量限值合规。（3）无横向氟气体时间表——与欧盟不同，约旦不施加类似欧盟逐产品的氟气体禁令时间表，故无类似欧盟2024/573附件禁令可映射；含HFC的旧型号（如有）通过约旦在基加利框架下的国家HFC进口管制管理，而非产品禁令时间表（须向进口商确认进口配额/管制状态）。
gap.zht: 由於中約均在器具層面通過IEC 60335-2-24處理R-600a，此處主要為文件與核實差距而非技術差距：（1）充注量文件——約旦產品文件及銘牌須清晰標明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及與所採納IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑要求一致的可燃性安全注意事項。（2）充注量限值核實——R-600a充注量須按所採納IEC 60335-2-24最大限值確認；因GB 4706.13源自相同IEC文本，中國CCC檢測數據通常已涵蓋，但提交JSMO的符合性檔案宜明確佐證充注量限值合規。（3）無橫向氟氣體時間表——與歐盟不同，約旦不施加類似歐盟逐產品的氟氣體禁令時間表，故無類似歐盟2024/573附件禁令可映射；含HFC的舊型號（如有）通過約旦在基加利框架下的國家HFC進口管制管理，而非產品禁令時間表（須向進口商確認進口配額/管制狀態）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via JS / IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant requirements (R-600a charge limits, documentation); no EU-style horizontal F-Gas product-prohibition schedule — HFC phase-down handled via national import controls under the Kigali Amendment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant in Jordan-market household refrigerators and is handled at the appliance level via JS / IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant requirements. Chinese R-600a units align well; the main task is documenting refrigerant designation and charge weight and evidencing charge-limit compliance in the JSMO dossier. Jordan has no EU-style product-by-product F-Gas prohibition schedule — HFC controls operate via national import measures under the Kigali Amendment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是约旦市场家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，在器具层面通过JS / IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂要求处理。中国R-600a机型契合良好；主要任务是记录制冷剂名称与充注量并在JSMO档案中佐证充注量限值合规。约旦无类似欧盟逐产品的氟气体禁令时间表——HFC管制通过基加利修正案下的国家进口措施运作。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是約旦市場家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，在器具層面通過JS / IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑要求處理。中國R-600a機型契合良好；主要任務是記錄製冷劑名稱與充注量並在JSMO檔案中佐證充注量限值合規。約旦無類似歐盟逐產品的氟氣體禁令時間表——HFC管制通過基加利修正案下的國家進口措施運作。
